transcript.text:
[It's getting so cold]
[I will still eat it]
[You can't resist the cold noodles even if it's too cold!]
[But how many are you eating?]
[How can one resist?]
[1 plate]
[2 plates]
[3 plates]
[4]
[5]
[6]
[7]
[8]
[9]
[10 plates down]
[How does that even make sense?]

[This is a record]
Hello everyone
I'm here in the city of Daejeon
I'm a huge fan of memil noodles (cold buckwheat noodles)
How much of a fan am I?
Well...
I would eat 7~8 plates of it at buffets as an elementary student
I haven't had it for a while
So I'm going to have some before the weather gets colder
Over there!
[Mijin] [Daejeon, Seo-gu]
Hello
[Side dishes]
I was going to eat just the noodles today, but Yubu looks good too
I'll take Yubu, please (Fried tofu stuffed with rice)
And also just 8 orders of Memil Noodles (Cold buckwheat noodles)

I don't think you can finish it all
I can do it no problem
You can't do it Order 1 at a time
But I want 8
How can you eat 8?
[Pot full of noodles]
[I guess I'll do it]
[Cold, icy broth]
[Let me show you how to make it]
(Adds radish and scallions)
-What's that? -Spicy mustard
I can't eat it!
[Trust me and try it]
[And also]
-Since you're eating a lot -Thank you
[Let's see]

That's tasty!
Can you make that 10, please?
[Stop...]
[Here...]
[10 plates of memil noodles]
Thank you
You're not finishing it, right?
I will
Really?
I want to hurry and dig in
-Did you make the noodles here? -Yes
Look at the noodles
That's amazing
Dip this in here
[More scallions]
Bon appetit

It's delicious Very chewy
The consistency is at 80%
If it's too much, the noodles get cut off easily
But this isn't like that at all It's chewy
I love it
Memil noodles are good to eat in any season
Dump it all in
I won't leave any behind
Yubu chobap (Fried tofu with stuffed rice)
I've been craving this
It's a little different than what we're used to
The liquid is all drained out
And its texture is different because of the black sesame seeds
Wouldn't it taste good if I dipped this here too?
It's good!
The cold broth makes everything taste good

I love it
1 down
She put spicy mustard in here, but I can't really taste it
The noodles are very soft
These are much thinner than other memil noodles
I like how thin they are because they're easier to eat
How long has it been? I feel like I'm doing a mukbang challenge
[Am I dreaming?]
[It must be a dream]
[Are you really eating everything?!]
[Of course]
[Already on her 3rd plate]
Let's try it with the plain broth
This is just pure broth
Will it overflow?
That's refreshing I love it

It's tasty
You're more adorable because you eat well
Thank you
Let's make a new bowl
I think she put this much
[Scallions]
[Spicy mustard]
[Icy brother]
1 yubu chobap Dip it
The noodles
Just put it in
It's cold now
Because of the cold food
This would've been better on a Summer day
It's a shame
It's still very tasty

You want some hot broth?
Really?
I already finished half
It's only been like 10 minutes
Thank you
He gave me hot udon broth
Thank you
[Get the vest on]
I want to eat quickly because it's so good
But I got really cold
The cold will not stop me from eating
This udon broth tastes so good I should've ordered udon too
Let's start again
I only have this much left?
Really?
Guys, it's getting really cold

Is it better now?
I think it's still cold
Let's exercise
[Now that she's all warmed up]
I feel like I will blow on the noodles soon
I'm eating so fast...
This is the fastest mukbang I've done Excluding the challenges
The portions are about the same as the other restaurants
I'm a fast memil-noodle-eater
Some hot soup after eating cold noodles
I like sweet and salty too, but
I also like cold and hot
You're full, right?
You can stop now
I'm not full at all
Let's get the noodles

Wow, looks good
The whole plate
[1 plate]
[is gone]
[in 3 big slurps]
Scrape it all in
Last plate
All at once
[She's really eating it all]
Yummy~!
I'm still not sick of it
Memil noodles are always good
Last plate
I've been wanting to stack these plates
That's 10 plates
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
